title: Parent/Family Involvement in Education * Native American Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Parent/Family Involvement in Education * Native American Community 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Refugees/Entrants/Asylees Native American Community Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF LANE EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT CHIFIN NATIVE YOUTH CENTER INDIAN EDUCATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers learning, leadership, and cultural activities that engage Native youth and support a positive cultural identity. Provides culturally appropriate educational support to Native students, including tutoring and credit recovery, and supports Native families’ involvement in students’ education. 1084 G Street Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Native American and Alaskan Native students and their families Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm (541) 726-4301 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LANE EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT INDIAN EDUCATION PROGRAM
